title: epicharis longicalicina
intro: Epicharis longicalicina is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, Epicharis longicalicina is used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Epicharis longicalicina can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional African medicine.
